productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Women Silver Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel round case Dial style: Silver dial with star patterns on the dial, white and black hands Strap style: Black textured genuine leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark, date aperture on the 9 hour mark, day aperture on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
